title: Skill-Lab Desk Manifest
description: Schema for desks/<desk>/desk.yaml. Defines a Desk's identity, capability tags, orchestrator skill, leaves, cross-Desk dependencies, and policy reference.

name.description: Desk name in kebab-case. Globally unique within the registry.

namespace.description: Registry namespace (e.g., '@MadewellRD'). Defaults to '@local' for unpublished Desks.

capability_tags.description: Tags used by the top-of-house router to match user intent to Desks.

orchestrator.description: Name of the skill within this Desk that serves as its command-desk router.

leaves.description: Names of leaf skills in this Desk. Must include the orchestrator.

workflow_packet_schema.description: Path to the workflow packet schema this Desk uses. Resolved relative to the Desk root.

policy.description: Path to the Desk-level policy.yaml file. Resolved relative to the Desk root.

depends_on.description: Other Desks this Desk depends on for cross-Desk composition. Version constraints follow semver range syntax.

supported_targets.description: Targets this Desk explicitly supports. Compiler will refuse to emit unlisted targets. If omitted, all targets supported by every leaf's capability_requirements are eligible.
